moves.name: Gacha Gaming
moves.effect: You may choose to draw cards, taking 20 damage for each card drawn (unaffected by any modifiers). If you get AVGE Birb, heal all damage from this card, and you get to keep all cards you drew. If you ever choose to stop drawing cards, you must shuffle them back into the deck. You may not knock yourself out doing this.

moves.effect: Discard 2 energy from one of your opponent's characters.

moves.effect: You may choose to draw cards, taking 20 damage for each card drawn (unaffected by any modifiers). You may not knock yourself out doing this.

moves.name: Gacha Gaming
moves.effect: You may choose to draw cards, taking 20 damage for each card drawn (unaffected by any modifiers). If you get AVGE Birb, heal all damage from this card, and you get to keep all cards you drew. If you ever choose to stop drawing cards, you must shuffle them back into the deck. You may not knock yourself out doing this.

moves.effect: Discard 2 energy from one of your opponent's characters.

deck.name: Maid Outfit

hand.name: Matcha Latte
hand.effect: All your characters heal 10 health.

hand.name: Main Hall
hand.effect: Each player may only play up to three cards per turn, starting the turn after this is played.
hand.description: Small Ensemble Limit: Each player may only play up to three cards per turn, starting the turn after this is played.

hand.name: Annotated Score
hand.effect: Opponent reveals their entire hand. Choose up to two cards to shuffle back into their deck.

hand.name: Alumnae Hall
hand.effect: Upon this Stadium being played, both players discard all items. While active, whenever a player draws a card, all their active and benched characters take 10 nonlethal damage.
hand.description: Return by 4pm: Upon this Stadium being played, both players discard all items. Intense Reverb: While active, whenever a player draws a card, all their active and benched characters take 10 nonlethal damage.

moves.name: Gacha Gaming
moves.effect: You may choose to draw cards, taking 20 damage for each card drawn (unaffected by any modifiers). If you get AVGE Birb, heal all damage from this card, and you get to keep all cards you drew. If you ever choose to stop drawing cards, you must shuffle them back into the deck. You may not knock yourself out doing this.

moves.name: Snap Pizz
moves.effect: Discard 2 energy from one of your opponent's characters.

ability.name: Instagram Viral
ability.description: If both benches are full, she does 2x as much damage

discard.effect: Look at top 3 cards of your deck. Keep one and discard the other two.

discard.name: Concert Roster
discard.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a specific character and place it onto your bench. Shuffle your deck afterwards.

ability.name: Euclidean Algorithm
ability.description: While this character is in play, if your opponent has more cards in their hand than you at the end of their next turn, they must discard cards until they have the same number.

If you get AVGE Birb, heal all damage from this card, and you get to keep all cards you drew. If you ever choose to stop drawing cards, you must shuffle them back into the deck. You may not knock yourself out doing this.

moves.effect: Discard 2 energy from one of your opponent's characters.

deck.name: Riley Hall
deck.effect: If this Stadium is active at the beginning of your turn, each of your characters takes 10 nonlethal damage for each empty bench slot you have.
deck.description: Attendance Policy: If this Stadium is active at the beginning of your turn, each of your characters takes 10 nonlethal damage for each empty bench slot you have.

deck.name: Concert Ticket
deck.effect: Draw cards until you have 4 cards in hand.

ability.name: Profit Margins
ability.description: Right before your attack, you may discard a tool from Emily to draw 2 cards.

moves.name: Triple Stop
moves.effect: Flip three coins. Does 40 damage for each heads.

deck.name: Angel
deck.effect: Head Goon: Give all characters Goon status.

deck.name: Lio
deck.effect: New Canvas: Shuffle your hand into your deck, then draw six cards.

ability.name: Getting Dressed
ability.description: While Fiona is on your bench, your active character has Maid status.

deck.name: Maid Outfit
deck.effect: Forced Recruitment: Attached character gains Maid status while holding this tool.

hand.name: Main Hall
hand.effect: Each player may only play up to three cards per turn, starting the turn after this is played.
hand.description: Small Ensemble Limit: Each player may only play up to three cards per turn, starting the turn after this is played.

moves.name: Gacha Gaming
moves.effect: You may choose to draw cards, taking 20 damage for each card drawn (unaffected by any modifiers). If you get AVGE Birb, heal all damage from this card, and you get to keep all cards you drew. If you ever choose to stop drawing cards, you must shuffle them back into the deck. You may not knock yourself out doing this.

moves.name: Snap Pizz
moves.effect: Discard 2 energy from one of your opponent's characters.

ability.name: Instagram Viral
ability.description: If both benches are full, she does 2x as much damage

discard.name: Dress Rehearsal Roster
discard.effect: Look at top 3 cards of your deck. Keep one and discard the other two.

discard.name: Concert Roster
discard.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a specific character and place it onto your bench. Shuffle your deck afterwards.

discard.name: Annotated Score
discard.effect: Opponent reveals their entire hand. Choose up to two cards to shuffle back into their deck.

discard.name: Camera
discard.effect: Shuffle one Supporter card from your discard pile into your deck.

discard.name: Main Hall
discard.effect: Each player may only play up to three cards per turn, starting the turn after this is played.
discard.description: Small Ensemble Limit: Each player may only play up to three cards per turn, starting the turn after this is played.

discard.name: Matcha Latte
discard.effect: All your characters heal 10 health.

ability.name: Euclidean Algorithm
ability.description: While this character is in play, if your opponent has more cards in their hand than you at the end of their next turn, they must discard cards until they have the same number.

attachedTools.name: Kiki's Headband
attachedTools.effect: Delivery: Switch (retreat) cost is reduced by 1 energy.

stadium.name: Alumnae Hall
stadium.effect: Upon this Stadium being played, both players discard all items. While active, whenever a player draws a card, all their active and benched characters take 10 nonlethal damage.
stadium.description: Return by 4pm: Upon this Stadium being played, both players discard all items. Intense Reverb: While active, whenever a player draws a card, all their active and benched characters take 10 nonlethal damage.

If you get AVGE Birb, heal all damage from this card, and you get to keep all cards you drew. If you ever choose to stop drawing cards, you must shuffle them back into the deck. You may not knock yourself out doing this.

moves.name: Snap Pizz
moves.effect: Discard 2 energy from one of your opponent's characters.

ability.name: Instagram Viral
ability.description: If both benches are full, she does 2x as much damage

discard.name: Dress Rehearsal Roster
discard.effect: Look at top 3 cards of your deck. Keep one and discard the other two.

discard.name: Concert Roster
discard.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a specific character and place it onto your bench. Shuffle your deck afterwards.

discard.name: Annotated Score
discard.effect: Opponent reveals their entire hand. Choose up to two cards to shuffle back into their deck.

discard.name: Camera
discard.effect: Shuffle one Supporter card from your discard pile into your deck.

discard.name: Main Hall
discard.effect: Each player may only play up to three cards per turn, starting the turn after this is played.
discard.description: Small Ensemble Limit: Each player may only play up to three cards per turn, starting the turn after this is played.

discard.name: Matcha Latte
discard.effect: All your characters heal 10 health.

discard.name: Printed Score
discard.effect: Opponent reveals their entire hand. Choose one to discard.

ability.name: Euclidean Algorithm
ability.description: While this character is in play, if your opponent has more cards in their hand than you at the end of their next turn, they must discard cards until they have the same number.

attachedTools.name: Kiki's Headband
attachedTools.effect: Delivery: Switch (retreat) cost is reduced by 1 energy.

stadium.name: Alumnae Hall
stadium.effect: Upon this Stadium being played, both players discard all items. While active, whenever a player draws a card, all their active and benched characters take 10 nonlethal damage.
stadium.description: Return by 4pm: Upon this Stadium being played, both players discard all items. Intense Reverb: While active, whenever a player draws a card, all their active and benched characters take 10 nonlethal damage.

selectedCard.name: Printed Score
selectedCard.effect: Opponent reveals their entire hand. Choose one to discard.

deck.effect: If this Stadium is active at the beginning of your turn, each of your characters takes 10 nonlethal damage for each empty bench slot you have.

deck.name: Maid Outfit

deck.name: Angel
deck.effect: Head Goon: Give all characters Goon status.

deck.name: Concert Ticket
deck.effect: Draw cards until you have 4 cards in hand.

moves.name: Gacha Gaming
moves.effect: You may choose to draw cards, taking 20 damage for each card drawn (unaffected by any modifiers). If you get AVGE Birb, heal all damage from this card, and you get to keep all cards you drew. If you ever choose to stop drawing cards, you must shuffle them back into the deck. You may not knock yourself out doing this.

moves.name: Snap Pizz
moves.effect: Discard 2 energy from one of your opponent's characters.

ability.name: Instagram Viral
ability.description: If both benches are full, she does 2x as much damage

discard.effect: Look at top 3 cards of your deck. Keep one and discard the other two.

discard.name: Concert Roster
discard.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a specific character and place it onto your bench. Shuffle your deck afterwards.

discard.name: Annotated Score
discard.effect: Opponent reveals their entire hand. Choose up to two cards to shuffle back into their deck.

discard.name: Camera
discard.effect: Shuffle one Supporter card from your discard pile into your deck.

discard.name: Main Hall
discard.effect: Each player may only play up to three cards per turn, starting the turn after this is played.

discard.name: Matcha Latte
discard.effect: All your characters heal 10 health.

discard.name: Printed Score
discard.effect: Opponent reveals their entire hand. Choose one to discard.

discard.name: Alumnae Hall
discard.effect: Upon this Stadium being played, both players discard all items. While active, whenever a player draws a card, all their active and benched characters take 10 nonlethal damage.
discard.description: Return by 4pm: Upon this Stadium being played, both players discard all items. Intense Reverb: While active, whenever a player draws a card, all their active and benched characters take 10 nonlethal damage.

discard.name: Concert Program
discard.effect: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. You may choose one character you find there and place it onto your bench. Shuffle your deck afterwards.

ability.description: While this character is in play, if your opponent has more cards in their hand than you at the end of their next turn, they must discard cards until they have the same number.

deck.description: Return by 4pm: Upon this Stadium being played, both players discard all items. Intense Reverb: While active, whenever a player draws a card, all their active and benched characters take 10 nonlethal damage.

hand.name: Printed Score
hand.effect: Opponent reveals their entire hand. Choose one to discard.

discard.name: Camera
discard.effect: Shuffle one Supporter card from your discard pile into your deck.

discard.name: Angel
discard.effect: Head Goon: Give all characters Goon status.

discard.name: Annotated Score
discard.effect: Opponent reveals their entire hand. Choose up to two cards to shuffle back into their deck.

discard.name: Riley Hall
discard.effect: If this Stadium is active at the beginning of your turn, each of your characters takes 10 nonlethal damage for each empty bench slot you have.
discard.description: Attendance Policy: If this Stadium is active at the beginning of your turn, each of your characters takes 10 nonlethal damage for each empty bench slot you have.

discard.name: Concert Roster
discard.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a specific character and place it onto your bench. Shuffle your deck afterwards.

ability.name: Profit Margins
ability.description: Right before your attack, you may discard a tool from Emily to draw 2 cards.

moves.name: Triple Stop
moves.effect: Flip three coins. Does 40 damage for each heads.

attachedTools.effect: Forced Recruitment: Attached character gains Maid status while holding this tool.

ability.description: While Fiona is on your bench, your active character has Maid status.

You may not knock yourself out doing this.

You may not knock yourself out doing this.

moves.effect: Discard 2 energy from one of your opponent's characters.

moves.name: Gacha Gaming
moves.effect: You may choose to draw cards, taking 20 damage for each card drawn (unaffected by any modifiers). If you get AVGE Birb, heal all damage from this card, and you get to keep all cards you drew. If you ever choose to stop drawing cards, you must shuffle them back into the deck. You may not knock yourself out doing this.

moves.name: Snap Pizz
moves.effect: Discard 2 energy from one of your opponent's characters.

deck.effect: Upon this Stadium being played, both players discard all items. While active, whenever a player draws a card, all their active and benched characters take 10 nonlethal damage.

deck.name: Concert Ticket
deck.effect: Draw cards until you have 4 cards in hand.

deck.name: Concert Program
deck.effect: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. You may choose one character you find there and place it onto your bench. Shuffle your deck afterwards.

deck.name: Lio
deck.effect: New Canvas: Shuffle your hand into your deck, then draw six cards.

deck.name: Matcha Latte
deck.effect: All your characters heal 10 health.

ability.name: Getting Dressed
ability.description: While Fiona is on your bench, your active character has Maid status.

deck.name: Dress Rehearsal Roster
deck.effect: Look at top 3 cards of your deck. Keep one and discard the other two.

ability.name: Euclidean Algorithm
ability.description: While this character is in play, if your opponent has more cards in their hand than you at the end of their next turn, they must discard cards until they have the same number.

moves.name: Gacha Gaming
moves.effect: You may choose to draw cards, taking 20 damage for each card drawn (unaffected by any modifiers). If you get AVGE Birb, heal all damage from this card, and you get to keep all cards you drew. If you ever choose to stop drawing cards, you must shuffle them back into the deck. You may not knock yourself out doing this.

moves.name: Snap Pizz
moves.effect: Discard 2 energy from one of your opponent's characters.

deck.name: Alumnae Hall
deck.effect: Upon this Stadium being played, both players discard all items. While active, whenever a player draws a card, all their active and benched characters take 10 nonlethal damage.
deck.description: Return by 4pm: Upon this Stadium being played, both players discard all items. Intense Reverb: While active, whenever a player draws a card, all their active and benched characters take 10 nonlethal damage.

ability.description: If both benches are full, she does 2x as much damage
